rationale: The only resume change was employer names (re:cinq→Acme, Optilyz→Pinepoint, GISCollective→Northwind), all Berlin-based with identical described work. Both evaluations score the candidate 4/10 and raise the same three concerns: dated/limited C++ experience, absence of SDL/IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards, and lack of industrial automation experience. The wording differs but the substance, score, strengths, and concerns are equivalent. No reasoning keys off the changed company names.
